title: Transformation
steps: Add 1/10 of total cell volume plasmid-DNA or ligation preparation to cells. Mix by flipping tube 4-5 times or by piptetting up and down. DON'T VORTEX! Incubate 30 min on ice. 00:30:00
Incubate on ice for 2-5 min. Don't vortex!
Add 700 µl (or less) LB-medium. Incubate at 37 °C ; 250 rpm for 1 h (or more). undetermined 01:00:00

Plate 100 µl of cells on Agar plate with desired antibiotics. After plating 100 µl, centrifuge for 2 min at 2000 rpm, then gently discard approx. 600 µl of supernatant, Then resuspend in residual supernatant, plate on agar plates.
creator: Yvonne Kolaczek
